title: zabelia umbellata
intro: Zabelia umbellata, also known as the Korean boxwood or Zabelia, is a type of flowering shrub native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zabelia umbellata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a herbal remedy, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
